title: Viners Barware Waiter’s Friend Classic 2-Step Lever Action Corkscrew and Bottle Opener, Black & Silver
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | The waiter’s friend is an indispensable barware tool for any entertainer or home. The lever-action corkscrew design is well known for its efficient and easy opening of corked bottles and doubles as a crown cork/bottle cap opener.

OPEN BOTTLES WITH EASE | Known as a sommelier knife, the waiter’s friend is a versatile, two-step opener. To use, twist in the corkscrew then brace the arm against the bottleneck and lift out the cork. Included is a retractable knife to cut protective foil.

STRENGTH & VERSATILITY | Made from fine quality materials, our wine opener is strong, small enough to fit in a pocket, and designed for ergonomic, comfortable use. Hand washing is recommended. Avoid abrasive sponges.

BARWARE RANGE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home, from bottle storage, to cocktail shakers, stirrers, straws, and more.

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from fine-quality materials.
description: From the manufacturer Champagne Bucket 4L Long Steel Drinking Straws Gift Box Ice Tong Bottle Stopper Everyday Set of 6 Steak Knives Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 36 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 4.0 out of 5 stars 29 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 — 4.5 out of 5 stars 394 Price £15.97 £ 15 . 97 £3.15 £ 3 . 15 £2.25 £ 2 . 25 £4.20 £ 4 . 20 — no data £11.94 £ 11 . 94 Description Store and serve your favourite champagne or sparkling wine from this large capacity ice bucket. Highly effective in keeping wines cold and suitable for all bottle shapes. Reduce plastic waste by using these reusable and durable long stainless steel straws. Supplied with a cleaning brush, the straws are easy to clean and can be used time and time again. You can use our stylish and modern ice tongs to serve ice and keep drinks cold. It is elegant and expertly crafted, making it the ideal gift to give to those who love to entertain. The triangular shaped stainless steel bottle stopper with rubber sealing rings will create an air tight seal on a variety of different bottle shapes, keeping the contents fresher for longer. The soft touch grip on this foil cutter makes removing the foil seal easy. Simply squeeze and rotate around the neck of the bottle. The fine blade neatly cuts and removes the foil. These knives effortlessly cut all meats. Crafted from quality stainless steel and non-stick coating, the serrated blades provide strength and durability. The curved handle, soft-touch handles provide maximum comfort and added grip.
